MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Ronald E. Taylor, appearing in Propria Persona via telephone conference.
Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default is heard this day. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of plaintiff in Propria Persona. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
